name: control mapping: /audit-pack emits warning section listing every control whose legal_review_status is pending (per §2.9)
command:
printf "- framework: soc2-tsc
  control_id: CC8.1
  satisfied_by: [rubric_rule]
  legal_review_status: pending
- framework: eu-ai-act
  control_id: Article-99
  satisfied_by: [hook]
  legal_review_status: pending
" > controls.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack.sh" --controls-file "$PWD/controls.yaml" --emit "$PWD/audit-pack.md" --section legal-review-status && grep -E "Pending legal review" audit-pack.md 1>&2 && grep "CC8.1" audit-pack.md 1>&2 && grep "Article-99" audit-pack.md 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
